title: Genie navigation and accuracy improvements
body:
* **Fixed back navigation error**: Resolved a bug where clicking the browser back button while viewing a Genie Space would result in an error.
* **Fixed entity matching documentation link**: Fixed a broken link to the description of entity matching (previously value dictionaries).
* **Improved column selection**: Genie now optimizes column selection to provide more columns with higher relevance while efficiently managing context consumption.
